Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 9 

OTHER_TAXONOMY_CLASS01 

LABEL: Other Taxonomy Classification 1 — for Part D Prescribers 

DESCRIPTION: An additional taxonomy classification different from the primary taxonomy classification. 

NUCC Provider Taxonomy Codes have three levels: Type, Classification, and Specialization. The 
Classification is obtained from the first four characters of the full Taxonomy Code and represents the
